name: ABC27 Stream
overview: Resolve and expose the ABC27 live stream as a Jellyfin-friendly playlist and redirect endpoint.
description: Adds an ABC27 live stream plugin page plus playlist, stream, status, and icon endpoints. The stream endpoint resolves a fresh Anvato manifest from the official ABC27 watch-live metadata so short-lived stream tokens can rotate without breaking the local playlist entry.

versions.changelog: Initial ABC27 plugin release with dynamic Anvato stream resolution and an embedded channel logo.

name: FOX43 Stream
overview: Expose a FOX43 live stream as a Jellyfin-friendly playlist and redirect endpoint.
description: Adds a FOX43 live stream plugin page plus playlist, stream, and status endpoints so the channel can be fed into Jellyfin Live TV or external M3U-based tools.

versions.changelog: Add an embedded FOX43 channel logo to the generated playlist feed.
